rationale.edition: All changed file paths live under src/ (Rust backend) and web/src/ (frontend) — standard OSS locations. No enterprise directories (enterprise/, o2_enterprise/, src/enterprise/) appear in the diff. No enterprise-only keywords (cipher, SSO, SAML, RBAC, SDR) appear in path or symbol names. The feature is clearly open-source.
rationale.skip: Not skipped. The change is OSS, no explicit opt-out label or comment is present, and the diff contains substantial user-facing UI changes across multiple Vue components (template badges, filter tabs, clone button, destination template selector, LLM insights restyling).
rationale.e2e: E2E is warranted — the feature introduces a new read-only guard for system prebuilt templates visible in the UI (badges, disabled delete buttons, row-selectability filtering), a clone workflow for templates, filter tabs (All/Prebuilt/Custom) on both the template and destination list views, and a template-selector dropdown on the Add Destination form. Each of these introduces new user-facing interactions that benefit from automated verification.
rationale.area: Alerts — the bulk of the UI changes (TemplateList, AddTemplate, AddDestination, AlertsDestinationList, usePrebuiltDestinations) live under web/src/components/alerts/ and the existing Alerts E2E spec folder already contains sibling specs like alerts-destinations-prebuilt.spec.js and alerts-ui-operations.spec.js.
rationale.group: Alerts — this is the existing Playwright matrix group (testfolder: Alerts) whose run_files cover all alert-related E2E specs including the existing alerts-destinations-prebuilt.spec.js. The new spec fits naturally into this shard.
rationale.existing_tests: No E2E specs in the diff. The only test file changed is web/src/components/alerts/TemplateList.spec.ts, which is a Vitest unit test — not a Playwright E2E spec. No files under tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/ were touched.
